title: doronicum japonicum
intro: Doronicum japonicum, also known as the Japanese leopard's bane or goldenflower, is a perennial plant belonging to the daisy family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Doronicum japonicum include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. Doronicum japonicum is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and it can also be used topically in the form of a salve or cream.
